overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a foggy swamp at dusk. The character walks along the water's edge past wooden siege ruins and barricades, then moves deeper into the marshy grassland with a moody, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: swampy shoreline with wooden siege ruins

events.description: character turns to face the water and look toward distant city towers across the foggy lake

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the shore near a wooden boat, surveying the foggy wetland environment and turning to look at the water

entered.detail: small wooden fishing boat beached on the muddy shore with a lantern hanging from the mast
tall ruined wooden siege tower with broken beams and collapsed sections
silhouetted stone towers visible through the fog across the water
sharpened wooden stakes and broken fortification pieces scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy swamp shore at dusk, with Geralt standing near a beached wooden boat. He walks past ruined wooden siege towers and barricades, then turns to look out across the misty water toward distant city spires visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path between wooden stake barriers along water

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the water's edge between rows of wooden defensive stakes, moving parallel to the calm misty lake

entered.detail: sharpened wooden stakes forming a defensive barrier along the path
still dark water reflecting the purple dusk sky with mist hovering above the surface

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow path flanked by wooden stake barriers, Geralt moves parallel to the calm misty water. The distant city towers shift across the horizon as he progresses, with the fog creating a moody atmosphere over the still lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marshy grassland with scattered trees

events.description: character turns left away from the water's edge and heads into the grassy marsh interior

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns inland away from the water and walks through tall marsh grass, exploring the swamp interior

entered.detail: tall green and brown grass covering the swampy ground with patches of mud
leafless and sparse trees dotting the marsh landscape

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the water, Geralt moves into the open marshland characterized by tall grass and scattered bare trees. The wooden fortifications fall behind as the terrain becomes more wild and overgrown with swamp vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep swamp with standing water pools

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the misty swamp, navigating around small pools of standing water in the grassland

entered.detail: small pools of dark standing water scattered throughout the marsh grass
dense line of trees marking the edge of the swamp clearing

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the swamp, Geralt navigates through tall grass interspersed with small pools of standing water. The distant landmarks fade from view as the tree line becomes more prominent on the left, and the fog thickens in the dim dusk light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a fortified swamp shore at dusk into the depths of a wild, overgrown marshland. It begins with Geralt standing by a beached wooden boat, moving past ruined siege towers and barricades while glancing toward distant city spires on the misty horizon. As he progresses along a narrow path flanked by wooden stakes, the camera tracks parallel to the calm water, keeping the distant towers in view through the moody atmosphere. The scene then shifts as Geralt turns away from the shoreline, leaving the fortifications behind to enter an open expanse of tall grass and scattered bare trees. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the swamp through standing pools of water, where the distant landmarks fade and the fog thickens against a prominent tree line in the dimming light.
